Headline: #72 North Temporary Eastbound Reroute near North Ave./Kolmar
ShortDescription: EB 72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Cicero, Grand, North Avenue and over regular route, due to street blockage near North Ave./Kolmar.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Cicero, Grand, North Avenue and over regular route, due to street blockage near North Ave./Kolmar.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Reroute near Pulaski/Diversey
ShortDescription: #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Pulaski/Diversey.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Pulaski/Diversey.

Northbound buses will operate via Pulaski, Diversey, Cicero, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Pulaski.

Southbound buses will operate via Pulaski, Belmont, Cicero, Fullerton, then resume their normal route on Pulaski.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage.
